html:
Exclusive to:

Barnacles are a Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. When cooked, it produces Cooked Barnacles. Barnacles have a 0.25 value of meat and fish.

They can be harvested from Sea Weed directly or with a Razor.

Recipes

×1.0

×2

×0.5

×2

×2.0

Trivia

  • Barnacles were introduced in the Troubled Waters update.
  • Although they are meats, Pig King does not accept Barnacles or Cooked Barnacles.
  • Easiest way to farm these is to use a sea sprout starter on a sea stack
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

“They don't look like knuckles to me.”
–Wilson, examining Barnacles.
“Ew, it came from the water.”
–Willow, examining Barnacles.
“Come out of shell, Wolfgang is hungry!”
–Wolfgang, examining Barnacles.
“We pried it from its home.”
–Wendy, examining Barnacles.
“THE SHELLS ARE CRUNCHY”
–WX-78, examining Barnacles.
“People in ancient times believed geese grew from barnacles. Can you imagine?”
–Wickerbottom, examining Barnacles.
“Not my first choice in seafood.”
–Woodie, examining Barnacles.
“I wish they were oysters.”
–Maxwell, examining Barnacles.
“Tis a paltry bit öf sea meat.”
–Wigfrid, examining Barnacles.
“We found them in the sea!”
–Webber, examining Barnacles.
“Ah, I've rarely had an opportunity to cook with these!”
–Warly, examining Barnacles.
“Hiding?”
–Wormwood, examining Barnacles.
“Took a bit of elbow grease to harvest 'em.”
–Winona, examining Barnacles.
“A briny bunch of barnacles.”
–Wortox, examining Barnacles.
“They hiding in shell.”
–Wurt, examining Barnacles.
“Foraged from the sea!”
–Walter, examining Barnacles.
“I had quite the time prying them free.”
–Wanda, examining Barnacles.
“I'm told it's quite a delicacy.”
–Wilson, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Fire made it better.”
–Willow, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Is taste of sea.”
–Wolfgang, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“It's... chewy.”
–Wendy, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“HEATED PROTEIN PODS”
–WX-78, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“As I suspected, it tastes nothing like goose.”
–Wickerbottom, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“They're not bad!”
–Woodie, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“It's an acquired taste.”
–Maxwell, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Yöu will find a new höme in my belly.”
–Wigfrid, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“We've never eaten barnacles before.”
–Webber, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“I think we can do a bit better than that!”
–Warly, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Chewy”
–Wormwood, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“They're kinda chewier than I expected.”
–Winona, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“I'd rather not.”
–Wortox, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Glurgh!”
–Wurt, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Hmm, it's not bad!”
–Walter, examining Cooked Barnacles.
“Only marginally better than raw barnacles.”
–Wanda, examining Cooked Barnacles.
Barnacles are a Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. When cooked, it produces Cooked Barnacles. Barnacles have a 0.25 value of meat and fish.
They can be harvested from Sea Weed directly or with a Razor.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hàu là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Khi nấu chín, nó sẽ tạo ra Hàu nấu chín. Hàu có giá trị 0,25 đối với thịt và cá.

'''Barnacles''' are a [[Food]] [[Items|Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. When cooked, it produces '''Cooked Barnacles'''.  Barnacles have a 0.25 value of meat and fish.

They can be harvested from [[Sea Weed]] directly or with a [[Razor]].

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* Barnacles were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Troubled Waters|Troubled Waters]]'' update.
* Although they are [[meats]], [[Pig King]] does not accept Barnacles or Cooked Barnacles.
* Easiest way to farm these is to use a sea sprout starter on a sea stack
